text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, Kawakami! Leave it to the genius
Magical Girl Sweepy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One lunch break, I spot two people chatting by a
drain...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Actually... I dropped my precious Princess Fighter
pen, and it fell through the grating! Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll get it with my magic! Both of you just sit back
and watch. Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Callistephus aster! That which was dropped,
return!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's going on?! Why isn't anything
happening?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh well. Lemme try again! Callistephus aster!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Come ooon! Why won't it wooork?! Callistephus!
Aster!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Callistephus! As—ugh! Cough, cough, cough!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Please be careful! You're going to damage your
throat!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
As a princess, I refuse to cause any more trouble!
I'll find some solution on my own!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Shut up! I said I would help you, didn't I?! Now
just shut up and watch!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay... Time to use my trump card! You two just
wait here!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: S-Sweep?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you waiting! I'm all set now!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You're in your signature racewear! It's a
pre-battle costume change!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Both princesses and witches fill with power when
they transform into their special suits! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's right! This here is Magical Girl Sweepy's
magic-boosting suit!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Look at these gold decorations on the jet-black
background! Doesn't it remind you of the moon in
the night sky?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Grandma always said that black is a strong and
liberating color because it's unaffected by other
colors.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's why black is the color for a witch like me!
Nothing can affect me!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Plus, witches use moonlight to cast our spells! It
gives us incredible magic that can do anything! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This outfit has a ton of other magical powers too!
Nothing's impossible when I've got this on!
choice_data_list: Ah, so that's why you changed clothes.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you get it now? You've gotten a bit
smarter, Familiar.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to refocus... Here goes!
Callistephus aster! Come back, pen!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh! Why isn't it working?! This is the strongest
racewear around!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: No, no, no! Come on! Something just has to happen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thunk!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look down to find that Sweep Tosho's stomping
fit has bent the drain cover and widened the gap!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh? I think I can fit my hand in now. Let's see...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Aha! I got it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I did it! I guess the magic just took a little time to
set in!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That was some incredible magic! Thank you so
much! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now, now. Let's not be too hasty. ♪ We can put it
back good as new!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hnrghhh! Barehanded Princess Preeesssss!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Amazing! It's right back how it was! Just like that!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I really am incredible! I even made Kawakami stronger! ♪
choice_data_list: Is this the power of magic?!
Princess plus witch makes for a great duo.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Duh! This is the power of the genius
Magical Girl Sweepy!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Everything is all taken care of thanks to
that incredible magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Well, of course! Us witches are always helping
princesses with our magic!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! ♪ And being good friends with witches
always makes us princesses much stronger!
